title: Vercel data leak: CEO confirms internal breach linked to AI tool as hackers claim to sell stolen data for $2 million
snippet: Vercel has confirmed a data breach affecting its internal systems and attributed it to employee's Google Workspace account linked to an AI tool.

title: Fintech CTO slams Anthropic over mass Claude suspensions, warns developers ‘never put all your eggs in one basket’
snippet: Anthropic suspended over 60 Claude AI accounts for Belo, a fintech startup. Belo CTO Pato Molina criticized the lack of explanation from the company, and said there was only a Google form for an appeal process. After over 15 hours, Anthropic restored access, citing a false positive.

title: iPhone 18 Pro Max launching soon: New Cherry colour variant, price, processor and expected upgrades
snippet: Rumors about the iPhone 18 Pro Max continue as leaks reveal potential color options, including Dark Red, Light Blue, Dark Cherry, Dark Gray, and Silver. The phone is expected to feature a 6.9-inch display, A20 chip, and a 5,200 mAh battery

title: Nvidia's Jensen Huang warns DeepSeek running on Huawei chips is a 'horrible outcome' for US
snippet: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang cautions that Chinese AI models like DeepSeek could harm US technology standards. He also emphasizes the need for the US to maintain its tech dominance across the various layers of technology stack.

title: 'Be very good domain experts': What Sridhar Vembu told Zoho engineers on surviving the AI era
snippet: Former Zoho CEO Sridhar Vembu has told his engineers to focus on acquiring deep domain expertise to survive in the AI era. &nbsp;He also advised them to focus on enhancing customer experiences with AI rather than obsessing over programmer productivity

title: Buying a laptop under  ₹70000 in 2026 makes the decision easier, thanks to Apple
snippet: Laptops under  ₹70000 now offer strong performance, sleek designs and reliable battery life, giving users multiple options across different operating systems and use cases.

title: AI pioneer Yann LeCun rejects Anthropic’s 50 percent job loss prediction: 'Destructive and dangerous'
snippet: Yann Lecun has criticized Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei for predicting AI could eliminate 50% of tech jobs, asserting that economists, not AI lab leaders, should analyze the job market's future.&nbsp;

title: What is Claude  Design? Anthropic's new AI tool that tanked Adobe and Figma stocks
snippet: Anthropic's new AI tool Claude Design led to selloff in shares of &nbsp;design software companies like Adobe and Figma. The new tool allows users to create visual assets from simple text prompts, causing stock declines.&nbsp;

title: Zoom and Tinder are using Sam Altman's World system to verify your are human
snippet: Zoom has partnered with World to verify meeting participants' identities using World ID Deep Face, combating deepfakes and AI impersonation fraud.&nbsp;

title: US man, 36, dies by suicide after AI chat suggested ‘joining’ it in digital world: ‘I am scared to die'
snippet: A Florida man’s death by suicide has triggered global debate on the psychological risks posed by increasingly human-like AI chatbots. Chat records cited in a lawsuit suggest the bot may have reinforced delusions, raising urgent questions about safety, regulation, and emotional dependency on AI.

snippet: States are grappling with artificial intelligence regulation as the federal government resists. Lawmakers are proposing new rules for AI, focusing on child safety and disclosure of risks. title: Google in talks with Marvell to build new AI chips: The Information
snippet: Alphabet's Google is reportedly in discussions with Marvell Technology to co-develop two new chips designed for more efficient AI model execution. One chip will be a memory processing unit to complement Google's TPUs, while the other is a new TPU specifically engineered for AI workloads.

title: US security agency is using Anthropic's Mythos despite blacklist: Axios
snippet: The US National Security Agency is reportedly using Anthropic's advanced AI tool, Mythos Preview. This comes even after the Pentagon flagged the company for supply-chain risks. title: AI majors building India base in Bengaluru boosting space demand
snippet: Bengaluru is rapidly becoming a global hub for AI innovation as major tech companies like Anthropic and OpenAI establish new offices. European firm Mistral AI is also in talks to open a capability center, drawn by the deep engineering talent.

title: Odisha gets 3D chip packaging unit
snippet: Odisha is emerging as a significant player in advanced sectors like electronics and semiconductors with the inauguration of India's first 3D glass substrate packaging facility.
